generated_oml:
instance DriveShaftEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on drive shaft for measuring motor shaft angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DriveShaftAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder positioned behind gearbox for measuring gearbox output angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance DriveShaftAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DriveShaftEncoder
    base:desc "Time series data of drive shaft angle streamed via MQTT protocol"
]

instance GearboxAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
    base:desc "Time series data of gearbox output angle streamed via MQTT protocol"
]

instance DriveShaftAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated and abstracted time series data of drive shaft angle"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DriveShaftAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink, CPlusPlus
]

instance GearboxAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated and abstracted time series data of gearbox output angle"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink, CPlusPlus
]

instance RFLP : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering methodology for Requirements, Functions, Logics, and Physics abstraction levels"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionLossAnalytics
]

instance OOSEM : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Object-Oriented Software Engineering Methodology for system complexity management"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionLossAnalytics
]

instance SPES : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Systematic Process for Embedded Systems development methodology"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionLossAnalytics
]

instance SMArDT : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Smart Manufacturing and Digital Twin methodology"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionLossAnalytics
]

instance ACME : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Architecture Description Language for component, interface, and connection modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualization
]

instance AADL : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Architecture Analysis & Design Language for component and interface modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualization
]

instance MontiArc : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Architecture Description Language for component composition and interconnections"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualization
]

instance SysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagrams for structural modeling of components"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionLossAnalytics
]

instance MontiArcAutomaton : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton for behavioral modeling of robot dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionLossAnalytics
]

instance SysMLStateMachine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML v1.7 state machines for behavior description of robot control"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionLossAnalytics
]

instance MathWorksSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for analytical simulations and friction loss detection"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionLossAnalytics
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ programming language for detailed behavior modeling and friction loss analytics"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionLossAnalytics
]

instance Java : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java programming language for dashboard visualization services"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualization
]

instance FrictionLossAnalytics : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for analyzing sensor data to detect friction loss and improve robot control accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossDetection
]

instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time monitoring and actionable insights via dashboard visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoring
]

instance FrictionLossDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating friction loss in mechanical components for operational decision support"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of robot status for operational decisions"
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor with gear transmission for driving robot axes"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller for precise actuator control and safety constraint enforcement"
]

instance MABIMAX100Robot : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "MABI MAX 100 six-axis serial industrial robot for complex manufacturing tasks such as machining"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is ensured through sensor arrangements that minimize positional uncertainty. Validation is conducted by analyzing deviations between simulated and measured data, with systematic error correction and uncertainty quantification processes to maintain data integrity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT communication protocol used for streaming sensor data. No details on network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, or security protocols are provided in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system complies with industry standards including SysML (including IBDs), AADL, ACME, and MontiArc as architecture description languages used in Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) for system modeling."
]
